title: dalenia glabra
intro: Dalenia glabra, also known as the smooth dalbergia, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dalenia glabra include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Dalenia glabra include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
